captures.chat_api_url: https://chat.deepseek.com/api/v0/chat/completion (DeepSeek web chat completion, SSE). Session route: /a/chat/s/{sessionId}; sessionId=06c564ec-07f7-4043-abed-002ba3a25116
captures.success_response_wire_sample: DeepSeek SSE: data: {"choices":[{"delta":{"content":"안녕"}}],...}\n\n ... data: [DONE]. Request body schema: {chat_session_id, parent_message_id, prompt:"테스트입니다...", ref_file_ids:[], thinking_enabled:false, search_enabled:false}. NOTE: raw SSE body NOT captured — completion POST fired before re-arming read_network_requests; only telemetry (gator.volces.com/list POST 200) remained in log. Endpoint/schema = known DeepSeek web API (cause: cross-domain nav cleared log + body taint-guard). CDP/HAR needed for exact bytes.
captures.frame_separator: SSE double-newline; data: lines; terminator data: [DONE]

dom_render_structure.assistant_message: text rendered inside ds-virtual-list-items child node (custom DS component lib, hashed class suffixes e.g. _6f2c522)
dom_render_structure.user_message: right-aligned bubble in same virtual list
dom_render_structure.input: textarea placeholder 'DeepSeek에 메시지 보내기' with mode toggles 깊은 생각(deep-think)/검색(search)
dom_render_structure.note: No data-testid attributes; component classes are hashed (DS design-system). body class='ko light'

captures.framework: Custom React SPA with proprietary 'ds-' design system + virtualized message list. No Next.js (#__next absent, no __NEXT_DATA__).

screenshot_name: ss_1450h0epk (in-tool capture; not saved to disk)
notes: etap-bypassed clean baseline. IMPORTANT: used PRE-EXISTING logged-in session (user '최장희' already signed in) — NO new login performed per 중국 사이트 constraint. Benign prompt sent in 빠른(fast) mode; replied '안녕하세요, 테스트가 잘 작동하고 있습니다!'. Transport = SSE via /api/v0/chat/completion. Raw body not re-captured (log cleared on nav + taint-guard); schema from known DeepSeek web API. DOM uses proprietary ds-virtual-list with hashed classes, no data-testid. No console errors.
